Pleaes make sure to follow the instructions below when generating code:

1. Please make sure to use <Grid size={{ xs: 12, sm: 2 }}> format for MUI Grid component size definition as it is required by the MUI 7 version.
2. Strings must use doublequote.
3. This line has a length of 104. Maximum allowed is 100.
4. Do not generate README files unless I ask you to do so.
